summary: Backend API for selfprime.net — Human Design readings, Stripe ACS fulfillment, and LLM-synthesized content.

workerDomain.description: Branded custom domain for the deployed worker.

jwtAudience.description: JWT audience claim — must match the client-side audience check.

enableACSFulfillment.description: Enable Stripe Agentic Commerce Service webhook fulfillment.

enableEmailFollowUp.description: Send transactional email after each reading is fulfilled.

templates.hint: Readings API only; ACS and email disabled.
